'''Brock''' was one of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] officers serving on the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vak Somoril]]. He was killed by the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==Biography==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Brock accompanied [[Gilling]] Agent [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] to the [[BloodScar]]'s base on [[Gepparin]]. In truth, however, he was commissioned by Colonel [[Vak Somoril]] to kill Mara Jade. Upon arriving on Gepparin, he waited until nightfall for his accomplice Gilling to ambush her while he distracted her. However, Mara used the Force to foresee the plan, so she was not caught in the planned ambush. When the pirates were awakened by the blaster noise, an unknown pirate ultimately shot Brock.
